description: Set yourself free with this Groversons Miss T moulded bra. Seamless comfort that'll make you feel liberated and confident. Perfect for t-shirts, close fitting tops and salwar kameez. Now let the world try and keep up with you. Beige with beige straps lace detail under the cups Made of breathable fabric for enhanced comfort Moulded seamless cups and complete coverage for extra grip and control Double layered cups Beautifully cushioned, adjustable straps with perfect stretch Wash care Hand wash below 40 degrees Do not bleach or iron Drip dry in shade Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
